title: Rename device - Rename, non English language
scenario: Renaming a Poly Bluetooth device with non-English characters displays correctly across Device Settings, Home screen, Find My Device, and Support page
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the connected device name to navigate to Device Settings.
3. In Device Settings, tap the device name field to edit it.
4. Enter a device name containing non-English characters (e.g., Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Cyrillic, or accented Latin characters).
5. Tap Save or confirm the rename.
6. Verify the renamed device name displays correctly in the input field on the Device Settings page.
7. Navigate back to the Home screen and verify the renamed device name displays correctly.
8. Open Find My Device from the app menu and verify the renamed device name displays correctly.
9. Navigate to the Support page (e.g., via Account or Settings menu) and verify the renamed device name displays correctly.
expected: The renamed device name with non-English characters displays correctly in all locations: the input field on Device Settings, the Device Settings page header, the Home screen device card, Find My Device, and the Support page.
